description_long: This is a modern urban bench featuring a sleek, angular frame made of dark metal, supporting a seat and backrest composed of horizontal wooden slats. The bench has a minimalist design, with the metal frame forming a continuous Z-shaped profile on each side, providing both structural support and a contemporary aesthetic. The seat and backrest are made from evenly spaced, medium-brown wooden planks, offering comfort and durability for public use. The bench lacks armrests, emphasizing its streamlined silhouette and maximizing seating space. Its robust construction suggests it is designed for outdoor environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. The materials and build indicate resistance to weather and heavy use, making it suitable for high-traffic urban areas.
description: A modern bench with a dark metal angular frame and horizontal wooden slats for the seat and backrest, designed for urban outdoor use. The minimalist, armrest-free design emphasizes durability and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, highlighting the wooden slat seat and backrest with the angular metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the Z-shaped metal frame and the thickness of the wooden slats, as well as the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid metal back support and the overall sturdy construction of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the Z-shaped frame and the alignment of the wooden slats.
